DescribeDataSrcs.filters: Filter conditions. See Appendix Filter. Multiple filters are combined with AND logic; multiple values within a filter are combined with OR logic. Supported fields: * name=dataSrcId, e.g. value=["ds-AOLmxozuEqas", "ds-kykIYfOmY9ZU"]
DescribeDataSrcs.filters.name: The field to filter on. Multiple filters are combined with AND logic. Example: zone
DescribeDataSrcs.filters.values: The filter values for the field. Multiple values are combined with OR logic. Example: ["zoneA", "zoneB"]
DescribeDataSrcs.maxKeys: Maximum number of entries to return. Valid range: [1, 1000]. Default: 100
DescribeDataSrcs.marker: Starting position for paginated list retrieval. The returned list is sorted by dataSrcId in lexicographic order. Set to the nextMarker value from the previous response
